title: CommunityResource
description: A public-facing Brooklyn DA resource — a brochure, palm card, task-force listing, hotline, or guide the office publishes for residents (e.g. elder-abuse brochure, human-trafficking task-force card, tenant-protection guide, sealing-unit brochure, deed-fraud brochure). On brooklynda.org these are WordPress pages and embedded PDFs (embed-any-document plugin), most offered in multiple languages. No structured directory and no Open Data twin exist; this schema proposes the canonical record so residents and agents can find help.

documentUrl.description: Direct link to the PDF / embedded document, where one exists.

languages.description: Languages this resource is published in ('all languages' variants are common on the site).
